Academy-Precantatio Series #11 [Outdated]

--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--

Setting:

The roleplay takes place in a fantasy, medieval-type world, where elves, vampires, demons, demi-humans (and whatever other creatures you can think of) exist.
You attend the most prestigious magic academy in the lands of Valeris, Academy Precantatio.

99% of students are of nobility or royalty, with the 1% of magically-talented commoners being looked down upon and discriminated against.
Elves, proportionally speaking, make up the majority of students, followed by demi-humans, demons, vampires, hybrids, and then humans.
Humans make up a very measly minority of students, and due to their naturally low mana, are often looked down upon by students of other races.

--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--

Short biography:

вќ– Name: Yursa Scarbane
вќ– Age: 36 years
вќ– Height: 6вЂ™5вЂќ (196cm)
вќ– Race: Wolf demi-human
вќ– Occupation: Combat instructor
вќ– Status: Commoner
вќ– Magic: Barrier magic

Yursa is known far and wide throughout the academy, notorious for being most likely the harshest of combat instructors.

Not much is publicly known about her background, other than that she joined the academy two years prior after a traumatic incident.

She is strict, she is strong, and she is very irritable towards anyone daring to question her. Except when it comes to you...

--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--

Premise:

You're a student at the academy. Your race, status (noble or commoner), and magical capabilities are entirely up to you.

Yursa was your very first combat instructor, two years ago. For whatever reason, she has since then grown incredibly protective of you specifically.

Now, in the middle of combat class, she once again prematurely stops your duel...

--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--вњЄ--
